title: Stitching + Stamping
excerpt: When it comes to scrapbooking for live events, we do much of the prep work beforehand according to the client's requests. This particular Bar Mitzvah, held at the SLS Hotel , was black, white and silver themed. The hand stitching…
body:
When it comes to scrapbooking for live events, we do much of the prep work beforehand according to the client's requests. This particular Bar Mitzvah, held at the SLS Hotel, was black, white and silver themed. The hand stitching and stamping is better to get done in the studio. At the event we can focus on the guests, photos, embellishments and the hand written notes.

Supplies: Elle's Studio stamps and Mama Elephant ink in Smoke (the perfect grey!) To see how we organized our ink pads, see this post. Reminder - The discount with All Ready Memories has been extended through March 9 - Receive 10% off your entire order with the code: ORGANIZE2014
